comment.body: We down in market cap about $15T in market cap. This amount if sustained would be expected to reduce GDP by between 1-2%. Quite a lot. The gov could offset that through accommodative policy but the cure t situation is complicated. Musk is cutting 3% of GDP from government spending but Trump is giving some of that back thru tax cuts.  Also usually with market down so much you would expect business investment to drop but tariff policy means there will be much investment into infrastructure. But all in all looks pretty negative for GDP
